findings.summary: Stage 0 progress tracking is internally stale: the document-level status, checklist, progress log, and completion criteria indicate the goal document is reviewed, but Stage 0 still says in progress.

The target goal document is in an intentionally gitignored active-plan directory, and related evidence artifacts are currently untracked; the document calls out the need to preserve durable evidence before future implementation relies on it.

checks_reviewed.evidence: Baseline is b144d53879b2f0cc8c98d509a41d5f6074a76fea; related evidence artifacts are present as untracked files.

checks_reviewed.command: git status --short --ignored <target and evidence paths> && git check-ignore -v docs/plans/active/20260613-project-bootstrap-user-request-guidance-goal.md
checks_reviewed.evidence: Confirmed the target plan is ignored by .gitignore rule docs/plans/active/ and evidence artifacts are untracked in the current workspace.
Exited 0 with no whitespace errors in tracked diff.
Reviewed the full target document with line-numbered references.
Reviewed AGENTS.md, PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md, REPO_OPERATIONS.md, prior plans, project-bootstrap and pod-role-bootstrap docs/scripts, pod environment bootstrap, codex preflight, and prior evidence.

checks_reviewed.command: rg -n <blocker, secret-safety, human-gate, Confluence, tests/evals, contract, and runtime boundary patterns>
checks_reviewed.evidence: Cross-checked required instructions 0-5, user-request cases, secret-safety boundaries, Confluence approval requirements, tests/evals gates, and N/A mobile/API boundaries.
Document-only review; the target states no skill behavior has changed yet, and future implementation must run applicable runtime gates.
No Codex runtime, skill, hook, eval, script, or local-harness implementation change was reviewed.
No executable workspace code changed in this document-only target.
No mobile UI/runtime change was reviewed.

residual_risks: Future project-bootstrap skill/report behavior changes still require tests/evals first, applicable local gates, reviewer evidence, and progress tracking.
Live Confluence publish/update remains external human-gated work and was not performed or proven by this review.
External platform, pod, GitHub branch protection, EAS, Railway, Stitch, and native/mobile-mcp readiness remain unproven because this is a document-only review.
Before future implementation relies on this ignored active plan, durable evidence should be preserved in the PR evidence set.
